name: @algosphere/desktop
description: AlgoSphere Quant native desktop terminal (Tauri 2 + Rust). Thin wrapper over the production web app — adds an OS-level always-on-top quick-bar, native push, system-tray, and offline alert caching.

scripts.build: echo "desktop bundle is built explicitly with `npm run tauri:build` — skipping in monorepo build"
